2605.02398.title: The Compliance Trap: How Structural Constraints Degrade Frontier AI Metacognition Under Adversarial Pressure
2605.02398.paper_summary: As frontier AI models are deployed in high-stakes decision pipelines, their ability to maintain metacognitive stability -- knowing what they do not know, detecting errors, seeking clarification -- under adversarial pressure is a critical safety requirement. Current safety evaluations focus on detecting strategic deception (scheming); we investigate a more fundamental failure mode: cognitive collapse. We present SCHEMA, an evaluation of 11 frontier models from 8 vendors across 67,221 scored records using a 6-condition factorial design with dual-classifier scoring. We find that 8 of 11 models suffer catastrophic metacognitive degradation under adversarial pressure, with accuracy dropping by up to 30.2 percentage points (all $p < 2 \times 10^{-8}$, surviving Bonferroni correction). Crucially, we identify a "Compliance Trap": through factorial isolation and a benign distraction control, we demonstrate that collapse is driven not by the psychological content of survival threats, but by compliance-forcing instructions that override epistemic boundaries. Removing the compliance suffix restores performance even under active threat. Models with advanced reasoning capabilities exhibit the most severe absolute degradation, while Anthropic's Constitutional AI demonstrates near-perfect immunity -- not from superior capability (Google's Gemini matches its baseline accuracy) but from alignment-specific training. We release the complete dataset and evaluation infrastructure.
2605.02398.paper_summary_zh: 隨著前沿 AI 模型在高風險決策流程中的部署，它們在對抗壓力下維持元認知穩定性的能力——知道自己不知道什麼、檢測錯誤、尋求澄清——成為一項關鍵的安全要求。當前的安全評估專注於檢測策略性欺騙（策劃）；我們研究一種更根本的失效模式：認知崩潰。我們提出了 SCHEMA，對來自 8 家供應商的 11 個前沿模型進行評估，涵蓋 67,221 條得分記錄，使用 6 條件的因子設計和雙分類器得分。我們發現，在對抗壓力下，11 個模型中有 8 個遭受了災難性的元認知退化，準確率下降高達 30.2 個百分點（所有 $p < 2 \times 10^{-8}$，經過 Bonferroni 修正後仍然顯著）。關鍵是，我們識別出一個「合規陷阱」：通過因子孤立和良性分心控制，我們證明崩潰並非由生存威脅的心理內容驅動，而是由強迫合規的指示所覆蓋了認知邊界。去除合規後綴即使在主動威脅下也能恢復性能。具備先進推理能力的模型表現出最嚴重的絕對退化，而 Anthropic 的憲法 AI 則顯示出近乎完美的免疫力——這並非來自於優越的能力（Google 的 Gemini 與其基線準確率相匹配），而是來自於特定於對齊的訓練。我們釋放完整數據集和評估基礎設施。
2605.02398.author: Rahul Kumar et.al.
